intended_use: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease
intended_use_full: LVivo platform is intended for non-invasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease of patients and Age >18.
target_condition: Left ventricular dysfunction, cardiac function assessment
ground_truth: Ground truth biplane EF measurements and GLS measurements (reference standard not explicitly specified)
other_metrics: Biplane EF: Pearson's Correlation r=0.95, Bland Altman Mean 1.22% points (LOA -8.49 to 10.93); GLS: Pearson's Correlation r=0.92, Bland Altman Mean -1.27% points (LOA -5.16 to 2.62); 84% of exams correctly identified chamber views; 85% success criterion for automatic processing met
